name: Fudge Pops
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over medium heat, combine pudding, milk and sugar; bring to a boil.
2. Cook and stir for 2 minutes.
3. Allow the mixture to cool for 30 minutes, stirring several times.
4. Fold in whipping cream.
5. Pour into molds or small paper cups.
6. Freeze until partially frozen; insert wooden sticks or plastic spoons into the center of pops.
7. Freeze until firm, about 3-4 hours.
